title: cyanea rollandia
intro: Cyanea rollandia, also known as the blue hibiscus or Hawaiian hibiscus, is a flowering plant native to the Hawaiian Islands, characterized by its vibrant blue flowers and large, showy leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to support digestive health. The health benefits of Cyanea rollandia include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting the immune system, among others. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
